reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
양배추잎에서는 바스락 소리가 나고 안쪽 심지가 분리 되어
간식을 넣어서 노즈워크도 가능합니다..
혼자서 갖고 놀기도 좋고 토스도 하자고 하네요
주문하실 잘 했어요:)
reviews.content_en: The cabbage leaves make a crunchy sound and the inner core separates, so you can even do nose work by putting treats inside. It's great for playing alone and my pup wants to play fetch with it too. Great purchase decision! :)

reviews.name: 뉴****
reviews.content:
평소에 노즈워크를 많이 해주는데 너무 똑같은것만 할까봐 양배추 새로운걸로 사봤어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
생각보다 넣을곳도 많고 난이도가 있는 것 같아서 만족해요!!! 
바스락 소리랑 삑삑이 다 있너서 넘 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I do a lot of nose work games usually, but I was worried about doing the same thing all the time so I tried the new cabbage version lol. There are more spots to hide treats than I thought and it seems to have different difficulty levels, so I'm really satisfied!!! The crunchy sounds and the squeaky ball inside are both great

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 평소에 노즈워크장난감 너무 좋아해서 양배추보고 귀여워서 구매했는데요! 바스락바스락 소리가 다른 장난감과 비교가 안될정도로 크고 그래서인지 오자마자 엄청 잘 가지고 놀았어요ㅎㅎㅎ 매일아침 양배추노즈워크 해주고 출근하는데 쏙쏙 잘먹고 안에 삑삑이공도 잘 가지고 놀아요 :)
reviews.content_en: My pup really loves nose work toys usually, so I bought this cabbage because it was so cute! The crunchy crunching sound is incomparably louder than other toys, and because of that, my dog started playing with it so well right away hehe. Every morning I do cabbage nose work with my pup before work, and it eats the treats so well and also loves playing with the squeaky ball inside :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 노즈워크하기 좋게 생겨서 샀어요!! 저희강아지는 식탐이 별로 없어서 똑똑해서 할줄은 아는데 귀찮은 노즈워크는 그냥 안해버리더라구요ㅋㅋㅋ 바스락 소리도 엄청 많이 나고 안에있는 양배추 안에있는 공 엄청 좋아해요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it looked good for nose work!! My dog doesn't have much food drive, and while it's smart enough to know how to do it, it's just too lazy to actually do nose work games lol. But it makes tons of crunchy sounds and really loves the ball inside the cabbage lol

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
평소에도 고기보다 양배추를 사랑하는 강아지 조카를 위해 선물로 보내주었어요^^ 
받은 첫날부터 좋아서 정신을 못차리고 가지고 놀더니 그대로 자려고 한다네요~~ 
잎사귀마다 바스락 소리도 잘나고 가운데 삑삑이공에 
노즈워크까지!! 
귀여운 디자인은 물론 기능까지 완벽한 장난감입니다^^
reviews.content_en: I sent it as a gift to my dog nephew who loves cabbage even more than meat! From the first day he got it, he couldn't focus on anything else and just played with it, and now he just wants to sleep with it~~ The leaves each make nice crunchy sounds and there's a squeaky ball in the middle with nose work too!! It's a toy that's perfect in both cute design and functionality ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 노즈워크 견생 8년차지만 좋아합니다 ! 너무 잘사줬어요 !! 집에 혼자 있는 시간은 많이 없지만 가끔 외출할 일 생기면 조금이라도 노즈워크 하고 놀고 있으라고 노즈워크 장난감으로 사주고 요것도 강쥐 취향이라 구매했더니 역시 취향저격 ㅎㅎㅎ 노즈워크 고수라 금방 찾아 먹긴해요 ~~!! 아가들이 좋아할듯한데 숨길 곳이 많아 잘게 잘라서 여기저기 이파리에 숨기고 공 밑에도 놓고 그러니 킁킁킁킁 소리가 아주 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 자다가도 뽀시락 소리 들리면 달려와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 친구 강쥐도 선물해주려고 했는데 품절이네요 ㅠ^ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Even though my pup is a nose work veteran of 8 years, I love this! Such a great purchase!! He doesn't spend much time alone at home, but when I occasionally need to go out, I give him nose work toys to keep him occupied, and since this matched his taste perfectly, I bought it and as expected, it's right up his alley hehe. Since he's a nose work pro, he finds the treats pretty quickly~~ But since there are lots of hiding spots, I cut up treats into small pieces and hide them throughout the leaves and under the ball, and the sniffing sounds are just hilarious lol. He even runs over when he hears the crunching sound while sleeping lol. I was going to gift one to my friend's dog too but it's sold out ㅠ^ㅠ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
강아지가 정말 좋아해요! 너무너무 귀엽습니다. 
바잇미 장난감은 하나도 실패한게 없는데 특히 농산물 시리즈 들은 너무 귀엽고 좋아하네요!! 너무 귀여워요
야채가게 양배추 강아지 입니다!
 🐶🥦🌽🍎🍌🍠
reviews.content_en: My dog really loves it! It's so so cute. BITE ME toys have never disappointed, and especially the farm produce series are so adorable and he loves them!! So cute. A veggie store cabbage doggy! 🐶🥦🌽🍎🍌🍠

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무너무너무너무 귀여워요>_<
공도 같이 있으니 두가지 방법으로 놀아줄 수 있어서 더 좋고 바스락 소리도 커서 강아지가 엄청 재미있어해요:)
노즈워크용 장난감으로 딱입니다!
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so so so so cute >_< Since the ball comes with it, there are two different ways to play which is even better, and the crunchy sound is loud so my dog finds it super fun :) Perfect as a nose work toy!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
귀여워요. 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요^^
노즈워크는 워낙 잘해서 그런지 금방 찾아서 먹고는 바로 팽하네요^^;; 난이도가 쉬워요ㅎㅎ
그래도 바스락 거리는 소리가 좋은지 물고 흔들고 이리저리 끌고 다니면서 혼자 잘 놀아서 뿌듯^^
reviews.content_en: It's cute. My dog plays with it well ^^ Since he's so good at nose work, he finds and eats the treats pretty quickly lol ^^ The difficulty level is easy hehe. But the crunchy sounds seem to be his favorite since he chews on it, shakes it, and drags it around playing by himself, which makes me proud ^^

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
귀여워서 웃었네요.
양배춧잎 사이사이 간식숨겨주니
잘가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: It made me laugh because it's so cute. When I hide treats between the cabbage leaves, my dog plays with it really well.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리도 많이 나고 간식 숨길 공간이 무궁무진하네요~ 아주 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It makes a lot of crunching sounds and has tons of space to hide treats~ Really love it

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
안그래도 예전부터 사주고싶었는뎅 마침 기존에 있던 장난감들 질려하는거같아서 개린이날 선물로 사줬는데 환장하고 너므 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 얘가 이런 인형류의 택이란 택은 다 물어뜯는
습성이 있는데 나름 튼튼해서 아직 버티고 있어요 ㅋㅋㅋ양배추 안이 공으로 분리되는것도 넘 귀엽고 전체가 바스락 소리가 나서 저도 만질멋 나더라구요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I've been wanting to get this for a while, and since my pup seemed to be getting bored with the old toys, I got it as a gift for Dog's Day and he's absolutely obsessed with it 😂😂😂 This guy has a habit of chewing up all kinds of plush toys, but this one's pretty durable and still holding up 😂 The cabbage opens up with a ball inside which is so cute, and the whole thing makes crunching sounds so even I enjoy touching it haha

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
첫구매 할인 이벤트로 주문한 킁킁볼 양배추 장난감
바스락 바스락 소리와 뾱뾱 소리가 나고
작지 않은 큼직한 사이즈에요

저희집 애기 진돗개 한테는 주자마자 양배추가 금방
수명을 다했지만 재밌게 잘 가지고 놀더라구요
엄마 뿌-듯🌼
reviews.content_en: Ordered the Sniff Sniff Ball Cabbage toy through a first-purchase discount event. It makes crunching and squeaking sounds and it's a nice decent size. My baby, a Jindo, quickly destroyed the cabbage, but he had a blast playing with it! Mom's so proud🌼

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
첫가입 웰컴딜 중 하나로 선택해서 구매한 제품인데 저희 집 분리불안 심한 9살 푸들이 너무 마음에 들어해요. 

양배추 인형 안에 간식 여러개 숨기고는 가지고 놀라고 주고 외출했는데 놀랍게도 분리불안 증세 중 하나던 아무데나 오줌 휘갈기기를 안 했더라고요. 특히 공에 환장하는 녀석이라 배추 안 공인형에 아주 집착을 하고요ㅎㅎ 노즈워크 용 장난감으로 매우 만족합니다^^
reviews.content_en: I bought this as part of the welcome deal for new sign-ups, and my 9-year-old Poodle with severe separation anxiety absolutely loves it. I hide multiple treats inside the cabbage plush and let him play with it before I go out, and amazingly, he didn't have one of his usual separation anxiety symptoms of peeing everywhere! He's especially obsessed with the ball, so he's really fixated on the ball inside the cabbage 😄 Very satisfied with this as a nose work toy^^

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 기존에 있던 장남감이 너무 너덜거려서 버리고 뉴장난감 알아보던중에 귀여운양배추 장난감이 있어서 우유사면서 바로 겟했는대 망고가 너무 좋아하네요. 뽀시락뽀시락 소리도 크고 콩안에 공간도 있어서 영양제 숨겨서 출근전에 던져주고 가니 쳐다도 안보고 잘 노네요. 집에 혼자두는게 맘에 걸려서 여러가지 장난감 많이 사주는대 신상가지고 잘 노는 모습을 보니 돈 열심히 벌어야겠네요.
reviews.content_en: My old toy was falling apart so I tossed it and was looking for a new one. I saw this cute cabbage toy and picked it up right away when buying milk—Mango absolutely loves it! The crunching sounds are loud and there's space inside to hide things, so I toss it with his supplements before work and he plays with it without even looking at me. I worry about leaving him alone so I buy him lots of toys, and seeing him play with new ones makes me want to work harder and earn more money!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요 바스락바스락 꺼내주자마자 엄청 좋아해요 !!
노즈워크도 할수있고 공도 있어서 더좋아하는거같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! The moment I opened the crunchy packaging he went crazy for it!! I think he likes it even more because he can do nose work with it and there's also a ball inside.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아는 동생이 먼저 구매하고는 좋다고.. 
아가도 너무 좋아한다고 해서 저도 구매한 양배추씨 2개

바잇미 미니바이츠 트레이닝 트릿-베지 6~7개를
1조각에 4등분해서 스무여개를 양배추 이파리
사이사이 넣어 주었더니 딸내미 둘 다 난리가 났어요 ㅋ

말티즈 3.3kg, 장모치와와 2.2kg..
둘 다 겁이 많아서 처음 보는 물건은 경계하느라
잘 안 가지고 노는데 간식을 넣아줄 수 있다보니
바로 노즈워크를 시작하더라구요

처음에는 자꾸 밀고 다녀서 둘 다 살짝 잡아주었고
아리는 간식을 다 먹은 후에도 계속 노즈워크 홀릭

바스락 매니아인 저희 아가들을 위한 인형 같고
작은 아이들이 노즈워크 하기에도 너무 좋네요!!

전 매우 만족 별 다섯개도 부족할만큼 너무 좋아유!!
reviews.content_en: My younger sister bought it first and said it was great. Her dog loved it too, so I bought two Cabbage seeds as well. I split 6-7 BITE ME Mini Bites Training Treats-Veggie into quarters and stuffed about 20 pieces between the cabbage leaves, and both my girls went absolutely nuts 😂 A 3.3kg Maltese and a 2.2kg long-haired Chihuahua.. Both are nervous dogs and usually hesitate around new things, but once I added treats, they immediately started nose work! At first they kept pushing it around so I had to guide them a bit, but Ari kept doing nose work even after eating all the treats. These are perfect plush toys for our treat-crunching-loving babies and so great for little dogs to do nose work!! I'm so satisfied that five stars isn't even enough!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 간식 숨길 곳이 많고, 바스락 소리에 삑삑 소리도 나서 아이가 매우 좋아합니다😊 잘 사용할게요!! ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Lots of places to hide treats, and with both crunching and squeaking sounds, my pup loves it so much😊 Will use it well!! hehe

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요..
가격때문에 망설였는데 사길 잘한거같아여!
강아지가 바스락+삑삑+노즈워크 쓰리콤보로 하루종일 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
양배추 잎 사이사이에 간식 넣어주면 쉬운 난이도로 아이들이 노즈워크하면서 놀 수 있고,
가운데 동그란 인형 안에 넣어주면 조금 더 어려운 난이도로 낑낑대면서 노즈워크 할 수 있어요! 
밤인데 잠도안자고 계속 바스락바스락 대면서 가지고 노네요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
고민하지말고 구매하셔요!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute.. I hesitated because of the price but I'm so glad I bought it! My dog plays with it all day with the crunching + squeaking + nose work combo 😂😂😂 You can hide treats between the cabbage leaves for easier nose work, and if you put them in the round plush ball in the middle, it's a bit harder and he'll whine while doing nose work! Even at night he doesn't sleep, just keeps crunching away with it 😂😂😂 Don't overthink it, just buy it!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
양배추 사이사이에 사료 넣어주면 잘 찾아먹어요 ㅎㅎ 급하게 먹는 강아지들에게 넣어주면 좋은것 같아여.
근데 양배추 사이사이는 노즈워크? 라고 하기에는 난이도가 너무 쉽고 그나마 안에 공처럼 되어있는곳에 넣어둬야 잘가지고 놀아요! 공은 누르면 삑삑 소리가 나는데 집에 딸랑 공을 너무 잘가지고 놀아서 공으로도 가지고 놀수있기 좋지 않을까 했는데! 저희 강아지는 공으로는? 그렇게 흥미롭진 않은것 같아 조금 아쉬웠어요 ㅎㅎ 그래도 바스락 소리를 워낙 좋이해서 본인만한 이 큰 양배추 인형을 물고 끌고다니네요^^
reviews.content_en: He finds kibble just fine when I put it between the cabbage leaves hehe It seems good for dogs that eat too quickly. But the space between the cabbage leaves is honestly too easy to call it nose work, and he plays with it best when treats are in the ball-like pocket. The ball squeaks when pressed and since my dog loves jingly balls, I thought he might enjoy the ball too, but surprisingly he wasn't that interested in just the ball which was a bit disappointing hehe That said, he loves the crunching sounds so much that he carries around this big cabbage plush and drags it everywhere^^

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
강아지 생일선물로 구매했어요!!
나풀대고 바스락 거리는 재질의 장난감을 정말 좋아해서
양배추잎 물고 흔들고 바스락 대니까 환장하네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
가운데 동그란 삑삑이 장난감도 입 크기에 딱 맞아서 엄청 좋아해요!!! 10kg 강아지한테 약간 큰 것 같기도 한데 손으로 잡고 놀아주기에도 좋고, 강아지 혼자 물고 놀기에도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Bought this as a birthday gift for my pup!! 🎉 My dog absolutely loves crinkly toys, so when he grabs the cabbage leaf and shakes it making that crunching sound, he goes crazy lol. The round squeaky toy in the middle fits perfectly in his mouth too - he loves it!!! It might be a bit big for my 10kg dog, but it's great for playing together by hand, and he also enjoys playing with it solo.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 부리가 큰아이인데 잘 갖고놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎ 배춧잎 사이사이 간식 넣어주면 찾아먹느라 너무 재밌어해요
reviews.content_en: My pup has a big mouth and loves playing with it hehe. When I hide treats between the cabbage leaves, he has so much fun finding and munching them!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 대형견이 갖고 놀기에 크기도 딱 좋습니다. 노즈워크 장난감 고민하시는 분 요 제품으로 강력 추천드립니다!👍 튼튼하고 배송도 빨라서 넘 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for large dogs to play with. If you're thinking about getting a snuffle toy, I highly recommend this product! 👍 It's durable and shipping was fast too, super satisfied!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
장난감이 많아 살까 말까 고민을 수백번 하다가 구매했어요‼️ 도착하자마자 사료 몇 알을 숨겨서 즤집 갱쥐에게 줬는데 너무 좋아하네요^^! 기존에 있던 삑삑이 공은 1도 신경 안쓰고 양배추만 찾아서 노즈워크에, 공놀이에, 바스락 소리 놀이에 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ여기저기 많이 쓰이네요!!

양배추만으로도 귀엽고 쓸만한데‼️‼️ 중간에 공까지 있으니 더 쓸만하네요 ㅎㅎ 노즈워크를 잘하는지 몰랐는데 쉽게 찾아서 당황쓰,,, 너무 열정적으로 놀이한 나머지 공에서 소리도 안나게 만들어부럿네요🥹🥹🥹

그치만 귀엽고 쓸모있으니 잘 사용할게요
reviews.content_en:
I must've gone back and forth a hundred times before finally buying this toy‼️ As soon as it arrived, I hid a few kibbles in it for my little hamster and he absolutely loves it^^! He completely ignores the squeaky ball I had before and just hunts for the cabbage - it gets used for snuffle play, fetch, crinkly sound play, you name it‼️

The cabbage alone is cute and useful‼️‼️ but with the ball in the middle it's even better hehe. I didn't know if my dog was good at snuffling, but he found the treats so easily I was shocked... He got so enthusiastically into playing that he actually made the squeaker stop working 🥹🥹🥹

But it's so cute and useful, I'll definitely keep using it!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content: 인형 색감도, 표정도 너무 귀엽네요! 바스락거려서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The doll's colors and expression are so cute! Love the crinkly sound.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content: 노즈웍하기에 좋아요. 바스락소리가 잘 나고 예뻐요.
reviews.content_en: Great for snuffle play. Makes good crunchy sounds and looks adorable.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 바스락바스락 소리나는 잎들도 진짜 많고 중간에는 삑삑이공이 있어서 더 좋아하는것 같아요!!ㅋㅋㅋ💚💚💚 무엇보다 간식 숨길곳이 많아서 여러모로 진짜 최곱니당!🤣🤣 다만 잎사귀가 쪼끔 쉽게 열리는 편이라 약간 아쉽지만 손으로 꽉꽉 모아주면 조금 더 오래 가지고 놀수있는 것 같아요!💚💚💚 진짜 귀엽고 무엇보다 저희 아이가 완전 좋아해서 기분이 좋네용💚💚💚
reviews.content_en: There are so many crinkly leaves that make that crunching sound, plus there's a squeaky ball in the middle which my pup loves even more!!ㅋㅋㅋ💚💚💚 Most importantly, there are lots of places to hide treats so it's really the best all around!🤣🤣 The only small downside is the leaves open pretty easily, but if I press them together firmly with my hands, my pup can play with it a bit longer!💚💚💚 It's really cute and most importantly my baby loves it so much, I'm in such a good mood!💚💚💚

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
고민하다가 고른 장난감인데, 아주 잘 골랐어요 ㅋㅋ
사이즈도 큼직하니 좋고, 바시락거려서 좋아해요!
노즈워크는 잘 안시키는데 산김에 시켜보니 바로 잘 하더라구요 ㅎㅎ
이 장난감을 사고 새로운 놀이가 생겼는데,
보통 장난감을 던지라고 가져오는 친구인데요
이 장난감은 자꾸 가운데 공을 빼놓고 가져와서 다시 붙여달라고 하네요..?ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
아예 사람 앞에 가지고 가서 공 떼고 붙여달라고하고, 다시 공 떼고 붙여달라고하고.. 새로운 놀이를 만들어 버렸슴미다 후 구찮지만 해줘야죠.. 우리 구여운 강아지들..?
reviews.content_en: I thought hard about which toy to get and I made a great choice lol. The size is nice and big, and I love that it's crinkly! I don't usually do snuffle play with my dog, but I tried it with this and he picked it up right away hehe. After getting this toy, a new game was born - my dog usually brings toys for me to throw, but with this one he keeps taking out the middle ball and bringing it back wanting me to put it back on...?ㅋㅋㅋㅋ He literally comes right up to me to have me take the ball off and put it back on, over and over... He created a whole new game! It's annoying but what can you do... our adorable pups..?

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이렇게 좋아할 수 있나요,,ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바스락 거리는 비닐소리에 반응하길래 바스락 인형을 사줬더니 뽕을 뽑고있오요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 오자마자 물어뜯고 애기들이라 노즈워크 처음 도전해봤는데 엄청 재밌어하고 좋아해요🥰 
양배추 인형 완전 강추해요 진짜ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 곧 또 구매해야할거같은 늬낌쓰💯
reviews.content_en: Can they really love it this much,,ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ My dogs reacted to the crinkly plastic sound so I got them the crinkly toy and they're getting all the joy out of it lol. They started chewing it right away, and since they're puppies I had them try snuffle play for the first time and they absolutely loved it and had so much fun🥰 The cabbage toy is seriously a must-buy, seriously lol. I think I'll need to order again soon 💯

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애벌래 장난감을 먼저 사고 세뚜세뚜로 양배추도 추가로 주문했는데요. 신상 장난감 좋아하는 울집 털복슝이 역시나 양배추 주자마자 신나게 가지고 노네요.
양배추 잎파리 부분 전부 바스락 소리나서 좋아해요.
가운데 부분엔 공 같이 생긴거를 입에 물고 다녀요.
굿굿
reviews.content_en: I bought the caterpillar toy first and then added the cabbage toy a little while later. My fur baby who loves new toys got so excited the moment I gave them the cabbage and started playing with it right away. Love that all parts of the cabbage leaves make crunching sounds. The ball-like thing in the middle stays in their mouth and they carry it around. Good good!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 바스락바스락 소리에 노즈워크하기 좋은 장난감인거 같아요 게다가공처럼 삑삑이에 주머니도 달려있어 강아지가 정말 좋아해요 완전 강추합니다. 첫 구매 해택으로 저렴하게 구입해서 더 기분이 좋아요 맘에듭니다
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sounds make it great for nose work games! Plus it has a squeaker and pockets, so my pup absolutely loves it. Highly recommend! I'm even happier because I got it on sale with the first-time buyer discount. Really satisfied with this one.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
언제부턴가 지 물건 주문한거 귀신같이 알아채는데, 양배추
보자마자 신나서 이리저리 물고 다니며 좋아합니다. 
가운데 부분이 분리가 되는데 공처럼 가지고 놀기도 하고 
노즈워크도 하고 정말 쓰임 많은 장난감입니다. 저와 강쥐 모두 대만족이에요
reviews.content_en: My dog somehow knows whenever I order her stuff 😂 She gets so excited the moment she sees the cabbage and carries it around everywhere. The middle part separates so she can play with it like a ball and do nose work games too - it's such a versatile toy! Both my pup and I are really happy with it.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
노즈워크는 처음이라 조금 쉬워 보이는 걸로 골라 봤는데
애기가 그렇게 막 어려워 하지 않고 좋아하는 것 같아요!!
게다가 간식 안 넣어 줘도 바스락 바스락 소리가 많이 나서
자기 혼자 알아서 가지고 놀아요
공에 있는 간식은 잘 못 먹는데 그래도 잘 가지고 놀아서 공이 찢어졌어요😂 다음에도 바잇미 노즈워크 사보려구요!!
reviews.content_en: This was our first nose work toy so I picked an easier-looking one, and my baby doesn't seem to find it too difficult - she loves it!! Even without treats inside, the crinkly sounds keep her entertained and she plays with it on her own. She can't quite get the treats out of the ball, but she still plays with it so much that the ball actually got torn 😂 I'm definitely getting another BITE ME nose work toy next time!!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 생각보다 노즈워크 기능은 크지않고 걍 장난감으로 가지고 놀아요 바스락장난감 정도네요 :) 아이가 모든 장난감을 다 좋아해서 잘가지고놀아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Honestly, the nose work function is smaller than expected and it's more just a regular toy to play with. It's basically a crinkle toy 😊 My pup loves all her toys anyway so she plays with it well lol

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
우리 멍뭉이 취향은 조금 까다로워서 장난감 사줘도 하루도 안되어서 팽- 질려하는편이라….양배추 구매할 때 고민좀 했습니다. 안에 삑삑이가 받아보니 좀 크더라구요 사이즈가 ㅋㅋ 테니스공? 다행히 우리 멍뭉이 취향에 맞았는지 잘 가지고 놀아요! 안에 삑삑이 붙여 놓으면 알아서 잘 뽑아서 놀아요! 아쉬운건 가격 대비 실밥 마무리가 조금 안되어있어서 따로 정리했습니다
그래도 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아서 만족해요!
reviews.content_en: My pup has pretty picky taste and usually gets bored with toys after just a day, so I was hesitant about buying the cabbage. The squeaker inside is pretty big though, like the size of a tennis ball 😅 But luckily it matched my pup's taste perfectly! She can grab the squeaker out all by herself and play with it! The only downside is the stitching around the edges isn't finished very well for the price, so I had to fix it myself. But since my dog plays with it well, I'm still happy!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바스락 거리는 소재고 배춧잎 사이사이 트릿넣어주기 좋아요 의외로 금방 찾아먹네요 노즈워크 초보 아기강쥐들이 갖고놀기 적합합니다
reviews.content_en: The crinkly material is great and you can easily put treats between the cabbage leaves. She finds them surprisingly fast! Perfect for puppies just starting out with nose work games.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
양배추 잎사이사이에사간식도 넣을수 있는건줄 알았는데. .ㅋ
바스래 소리만나고 가운데 공같은거에만 간식 조금 넣을수 있는거네요. .그래도 아가들이 한번씩 관심갖고 놀아주니 다행입니다. .
간식넣고 노즈워크 할수있는 장난감이면 더 좋았겠습니당. .
reviews.content_en: I thought you could put treats between the cabbage leaves, but it turns out you can only put treats in the little ball in the middle 😅 Still, the pups show interest and play with it so that's good. It would've been even better if it was a nose work toy where you could hide treats everywhere though.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
계속 눈여겨 봤었는데 진작 살걸 그랬어요
강아지가 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I've been eyeing this for a while - wish I bought it sooner! My dog absolutely loves it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락소리로 관심을 끌고 안의
인형은 삑삑소리도 나서 재미나게
잘 놀구 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sounds grab the attention and the toy inside makes a squeaker sound too, so she plays with it really well and enjoys it!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 양배추 장난감의 구성이 아주 좋은 것 같아요! 바스락거려서 소리도 재미있고 간식도 숨겨놓을 수 있어서 활용도가 좋은것 같아요! 양배추 공도 따로 분리해서 공놀이를 할 수 있는 점도 좋았어요👍 무엇보다 이 깜찍한 사진을 찍을 수 있다는 점에서 별 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️개 드립니다!!
reviews.content_en: The cabbage toy is really well made! The crinkly sounds are fun and you can hide treats inside, so it's very versatile! I also love that you can separate the cabbage ball to play fetch with it separately 👍 But most importantly, I give it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ stars just for being able to take such adorable photos with it!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저번에 너무 잘놀았는데 찢어져서 또 주문했아요~~ 너무 귀엽고 노즈워크도 되고 많이 바스락거려서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: He had so much fun with it last time, but it got torn so I ordered again~~ It's super cute, great for nose work, and he loves the crinkly sound!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락바스락 소리 때문에 더좋아하네요!!
reviews.content_en: He loves it even more because of the crinkly sound!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바스락 소리 아주 잘나서 간식이나 사료 숨겨주면 넘 좋아하네요 오래 가지고 놀아서 만족합니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The crinkly sound is amazing, and he goes crazy when I hide treats or kibble in it. He plays with it for so long, really satisfied with it hehe

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 태어나서 처음하는 노즈워크..너무 잘하더라구요..ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: His first time doing nose work ever.. he was so good at it.. lol

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 환장해요.. 사료도 안숨겨놨는데 아직 아가라 이가 간지러운지 바스락바스락 공도 물었다가 놨다가 넘 잘 놀아서 완전 뿌듯하네여ㅠ 장난감 사줄 맛 나는 장난감이였습니당
reviews.content_en: My pup is obsessed.. I didn't even hide any food in it, but since he's still young and teething, he keeps picking up the crinkly ball and putting it down, playing with it so well. It's such a rewarding toy to have gotten him ㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
웰컴딜로 구매해보았어요:)
 꼼꼼한 마감 처리가 너무 마음에 들어요. 감사합니다.^^
reviews.content_en: Got it on a welcome deal :) I really love the detailed finishing. Thank you.^^

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 잘 못하는 애인줄 알았는데
유기견이라 처음에는 잘 못한거였나 봅니다…
지금은 양배추 코 박고 노즈워크  잘하네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 😂
reviews.content_en: I thought he couldn't do nose work, but I think it was because he's a rescue and didn't know how at first… Now he's got his nose buried in the cabbage doing nose work perfectly hahahaha 😂

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 강아지가 정말 너무 좋아해요! 코를 박고 나올 생각도 안하네요ㅎㅎㅎ 안에 공이 들어있는건 어떻게 알았는지 귀신 같이 빼서 놀더라구요! 너무너무 잘 산 것 같습니다
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves it! He keeps his nose in it and doesn't want to take it out hehe He somehow figured out there's a ball inside and started pulling it out like he's a mind reader! I think this was such a great purchase

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감이 너무 귀여워요ㅠㅠㅠ 그와중에 포장 퀄리티도 장난아닌데욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The toy is so cute ㅠㅠㅠ And the packaging quality is seriously insane too lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 안에 배추알도 뗄 수 있고 아이가 좋아할만한 요소가 많아요! 대만족!!
reviews.content_en: The cabbage pieces inside can be removed and there are so many elements that my pup loves! Completely satisfied!!
